welcome.headline: Your virtual startup, fully autonomous
welcome.subtitle: The first end-to-end platform for building real products with autonomous AI agents. Define what to build, assign agent teams, and let them ship — from architecture to QA, every department runs itself.
welcome.generateKeyExplanation: This key secures your Agented instance. Store it safely — it won't be shown again.
welcome.generateFailed: Failed to generate API key. Please try again.

bento.productsDesc: Define what you're building. Connect GitHub repos as projects under each product. Your agents take it from there.
bento.teamsDesc: 5 departments, 17 agents. {command} sets direction. {dev} builds. {research} explores. {ops} solves. {qa} validates.
bento.schedulingDesc: Agents move seamlessly between Claude Code, ChatGPT, Gemini, OpenCode — harness sync keeps configs aligned, token usage prediction triggers handoff before limits hit.
bento.harnessDesc: Full harness engineering — config sync, GRD planning, MCP servers, marketplace plugins, custom skills and hooks.

tour.setupCompleteDesc: Your workspace is ready. Here's what you configured:
tour.skipConfirmMessage: You can complete it later from the setup checklist.
tour.restartDesc: Restart the onboarding tour to re-run through workspace setup and account configuration. Your existing configuration will not be affected.

workspace.title: Workspace Directory
workspace.message: Set the root directory where repos will be cloned for your agent teams.

claude.title: AI Backend Accounts
claude.message: Register a Claude Code account. Click 'Add Account' to enter your Anthropic credentials.

codex.title: AI Backend Accounts
codex.message: Register a Codex CLI account for OpenAI integration (optional). Click 'Add Account' to configure.

gemini.title: AI Backend Accounts
gemini.message: Register a Gemini CLI account for Google AI (optional). Click 'Add Account' to configure.

opencode.title: AI Backend Accounts
opencode.message: OpenCode routes through other AI backends. No separate account needed if you registered one above.

monitoring.title: Token Monitoring
monitoring.message: Configure rate limit monitoring to track token usage across your AI backend accounts.

verification.title: Harness Verification
verification.message: Verify the harness integration plugin is configured for deploying skills to your marketplace.

product.title: Create Your First Product
product.message: Products group related projects under a shared context. Click to create your first product.

project.title: Create Your First Project
project.message: Projects track work within a product. Click to add your first project.

team.title: Set Up a Team
team.message: Teams assign agents to projects. Set up a team to start running bots.

accountWizard.loginOptional: Login is optional — continue if already authenticated
